name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Andiamo Snake Skin Handbag. The snake skin finally joins the Andiamo family. As a fan of the brand, you know Andiamo is a deserved classic bestseller. It fits any season and perfectly meets the style of women who don't want to be too flashy or burdensome. Combining its own elegance, the snake skin doesn't feel too ostentatious, revealing a wild side with full exotic charm.
